videos.title: Post 10 WRONG!!!* DON'T DO THIS *UK MUM STOP LIFTING *PREGNANT MOM * Look at this NHS MEDICAL graphic!!! RED = DANGER ZONE vs GREEN = LUXURY SAFE ZONE Li The difference is literally SAVING your SPINE + BABY!!! Which one are YOU doing mama?!* IMPROPER REACHING & LIFTING = SPINE DESTRUCTION XX * UK MUM if you lift like TOP image, you're literally CRUSHING your back!!! NHS midwives warn about this DAILY!!! Here's the DAMAGE happening RIGHT NOW *EXCESSIVE LUMBAR FLEXION 1 * See that BENT lower back?! That's SPINAL STRAIN!!! Every lift = disc compression!!! UK mums get herniated discs + sciatica after birth!!! Not cute mama!!! NHS physios scream "NEUTRAL SPINE ONLY!!!" 2 *ROUNDED BACK * Back curved like C-shape = MUSCLE TEAR RISK!!! Diastasis recti starts HERE!!! Postpartum "mummy tummy" that NEVER goes away!!! German + US + UK doctors ALL say "flat back only!!!*DROPPED FORWARD HEAD * Chin to chest = NECK STRAIN + headaches!!! Cervical spine under PRESSURE!!! Balance lost = FALL RISK!!! Pregnant hormones = loose ligaments!!! One wrong lift = A&E!!! 4 *UNSTABLE PELVIS * Pelvis wobbling = SPD pain = "lightning crotch" Walking in London streets becomes HELL!!! Birth position also gets messed up!!! Baby not in optimal position!!! 5 *LOCKED KNEES* Knees straight + locked = NO shock absorption!!! All weight goes to spine!!! Your knees + back carry TRIPLE weight now!!! Ligament injury forever!!! 6 *UNSTABLE SUPPORT Reaching far = OFF BALANCE!!! Skeleton shows red pain!!! Vase too far = leverage against YOU!!! UK hospitals FULL of pregnant lifting injuries!!! *TAG A PREGNANT BESTIE IN UK NOW!!!* One tag = one spine saved!!! * Share = you're a QUEEN W Send to every UK pregnancy group!!! * SAFE SUPPORTED LIFTING = MAMA LUXURY ✓ ✓ * Now look at BOTTOM image = PURE AESTHETIC + PURE SAFETY!!! This is whatNHS midwives teach UK mums!!! It's like VIP lifting for your spine + baby!!! *NEUTRAL SPINE ALIGNMENT الد 1 * Back STRAIGHT like a queen!!! Natural curves only!!! No rounding, no red glow!!! Discs stay HAPPY!!! Wake up in your London flat rted L WITHOUT stabbing back pain!!! 2 *HEAD Stacked perfectly!!! Power comes from legs + core!!! Not from weak back!!! Strong mama energy!!! 4 *OBJECT CLOSE TO CORE ✓ ALIGNED EYES FORWARD * Chin level, gaze forward!!! Neck SAFE!!! Balance = 1000%!!! No dizziness, no falling!!! US + UK + German guidelines ALL agree!!! 3 *SHOULDERS ALIGNED OVER HIPS ✓ * * Vase hugged to belly!!! Less leverage = less strain!!! Baby also feels SAFE + secure!!! Better blood flow = happier baby!!! 5 *KNEES ALIGNED NOT LOCKED * Squat down, don't bend over!!! Knees bent = shock absorbers ON!!! "Hip hinge" technique!!! Bye back pain + knee pain!!! 6 *SUPPORT BEG HINGES HIP HINGE ✓ * Move from HIPS not spine!!! Push bum back, chest proud!!!Skeleton shows GREEN glow = healthy!!! UK midwives call this "golden lift method"!!! * EXCLUSIVE NHS HACKS FOR UK MUMS !!! ***NHS RULE*: "Bend knees, not back"!!! Get close first, lift second!!! 米 *UK TIP*: If object heavy = ASK FOR HELP!!! Lif No shame mama!!! Maternity belt from Mothercare = GAME CHANGER!!! *UK MUMS*: Never lift + twist together!!! Turn feet first, then whole body!!! *GOLDEN RULE UK *: Close → Squat → Lift with legs!!! Never reach + bend!!! If too heavy = DON'T LIFT!!! Your body is working 24/7 for baby!!! *BEAUTIFUL TRUTH*: Lifting shouldn't mean PAIN!!! Right method = 90% less back pain + zero SPD + safer baby!!! This is FREE + works in UK, USA, Germany, ANYWHERE!!! No doctor needed!!! This graphic = based on NHS medical illustrations for education!!! Always check with YOUR midwife/doctor!!! Every pregnancy is unique gorgeous UK mama!!! 米 *SAVE THIS POST #PregnantUK#Fypppppppppppppppp #PregnancySafetyUK #viral #UKMumToBe

bsky.name: Mrs. Betty Bowers
bsky.text:
The Pentagon is withholding causality and hit numbers.

The CDC is withholding infection rates.

The FDA is withholding information about food contamination.

The EPA is withholding pollution and climate data.

This corrupt administration is ALL about concealing the consequences
bsky.ko: **국방부**는 사상자·타격 수치를 숨기고 있다. **CDC**는 감염률을 숨기고 있다. **FDA**는 식품 오염 정보를 숨기고 있다. **EPA**는 오염·기후 데이터를 숨기고 있다. 이 **부패한 행정부**가 하는 일이라곤 결과를 은폐하는 것뿐이다.

bsky.name: Max Kennerly
bsky.text: $100 to any reporter who asks him, "so you're saying Capitol Police should've shot dead everyone who breached the Capitol on January 6?"
bsky.ko: 그에게 "그러니까 **1월 6일** 의사당에 난입한 사람들을 **의사당 경찰**이 전부 사살했어야 한다는 말이냐?"라고 물어보는 기자에게 **100달러** 드립니다.

bsky.name: Mueller, She Wrote
bsky.text: NEW: Olympian Davey Hearn - charged with damaging the reflecting pool - has asked for the charges to be dismissed arguing the government destroyed exculpatory evidence when it drained the pool again. s3.documentcloud.org/documents/28...
bsky.ko: 속보: 반사 연못(reflecting pool)을 훼손한 혐의로 기소된 올림픽 선수 **데이비 헌(Davey Hearn)**이, 정부가 연못 물을 다시 빼면서 무죄를 입증할 증거를 없애버렸다며 혐의 기각을 요청했다. s3.documentcloud.org/documents/28...

bsky.name: Maureen Johnson
bsky.text: I look for info on the McConnell situation about 5 times a day, because--legitimately--as a mystery writer I have a major interest in how you hide a dead body.
bsky.ko: 나는 하루에 다섯 번쯤 **매코널** 근황을 찾아본다. 왜냐면 — 진심으로 — 미스터리 작가로서 시체를 어떻게 숨기는지에 지대한 관심이 있거든.

bsky.name: Forbes
bsky.text: The New York Times reported Monday that dozens of U.S. service members were injured in three Iranian strikes last week that weren’t publicly disclosed by the Pentagon.
bsky.ko: **뉴욕타임스**는 월요일, 지난주 세 차례의 **이란 공격**으로 미군 수십 명이 부상했으나 **국방부**가 이를 공개하지 않았다고 보도했다.

bsky.name: Kristin Wilkinson 🍁
bsky.text:
My oil painting of my grandfather 
#art #painting

bsky.name: Ben Collins
bsky.text: Oh right, we're in Hudson News now! Get an Onion while your flight is delayed because of the things likely outlined in the paper.
bsky.ko: 아 맞다, 이제 우리가 **허드슨 뉴스**에 입점했지! 신문에 실릴 법한 그 소식들 때문에 비행기가 연착되는 동안 **디 어니언** 한 부 챙기세요.

bsky.name: Petra Michaela
bsky.text: We see the sun as golden. Yet this is an optical illusion. In reality, our sun shines in pure white. Earth's atmosphere scatters the sunlight, coloring it gold to our eyes. That is why sunrises and sunsets appear so colorful. A small miracle of physics. A source of great wonder a
bsky.ko: 우리는 태양을 황금빛으로 봅니다. 하지만 이건 착시예요. 실제로 **우리 태양은 순수한 흰색**으로 빛나죠. 지구의 대기가 햇빛을 산란시켜 우리 눈에는 금빛으로 물들어 보이는 겁니다. 일출과 일몰이 그토록 화려한 이유죠. 물리학이 만든 작은 기적, 그리고 커다란 경이의 원천이에요.

bsky.name: Jon Cooper
bsky.text:
Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear has the constitutional authority to temporarily appoint someone to fill Mitch McConnell’s seat. If GOP lawmakers want to challenge that, they can do so.

This will be the first big test to see whether Beshear really is presidential material. I hope he p
bsky.ko: **켄터키 주지사 앤디 베셔**는 **미치 매코널**의 상원 의석을 채울 사람을 임시로 임명할 헌법적 권한이 있다. **공화당** 의원들이 이의를 제기하고 싶다면 그렇게 하면 된다. 이번 일은 베셔가 정말 대권 재목인지 보여줄 첫 번째 큰 시험대가 될 것이다. 그가 잘 해내길 바란다.

bsky.name: WeRateDogs
bsky.text: This is Bruno and Rocket. Rocket insists on making a grand entrance. Bruno is happy to help with that. 13/10 for both (IG: bruno_da_doxie_doggie)
bsky.ko: 얘들은 **브루노**와 **로켓**이에요. 로켓은 꼭 화려하게 등장해야 직성이 풀리죠. 브루노는 기꺼이 그걸 도와주고요. 둘 다 **13/10**점 (IG: bruno_da_doxie_doggie)

bsky.name: ProPublica
bsky.text: NEW: As ProPublica and @startribune.com investigated child sexual abuse in the Old Apostolic Lutheran Church, reporters found a common theme: children who were victims of sexual misconduct going on to repeat the behavior.
bsky.ko: [신규] **프로퍼블리카**와 @startribune.com이 **올드 아포스톨릭 루터교회**의 아동 성학대를 취재하면서, 기자들은 하나의 공통된 양상을 발견했다. 성적 학대의 피해자였던 아이들이 자라서 같은 행동을 되풀이한다는 것이다.
